meta.title: The Realignment Ep. 19: Representative Mike Gallagher
meta.description:
In The Realignment’s season one finale, Marshall and Saagar return to Capitol Hill and speak with Wisconsin Congressman Mike Gallagher about how he’s navigating the realignment era.

Subscribe to be notified about new episodes every week:

Spotify: https://spoti.fi/2Kb1kyz
Apple Podcasts: https://podcasts.apple.com/us/podcast...
Google Podcasts: https://bit.ly/2Ox1d4o
Stitcher: https://bit.ly/2OAjqy9

Learn more about The Realignment at: https://www.hudson.org/
